runners.formComment: Last start finished fourth on April 5 over 450m at this track behind Cash Riot, beaten 5.5 lengths (25.64) in a Grade 5. Other runners look much more appealing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished fourth on April 5 over 450m at this track behind Cash Riot, beaten 5.5 lengths (25.64) in a Grade 5. Other runners look much more appealing.

runners.formComment: Resumes from a ten weeks spell and was a winner at only other fresh up run, scoring in 25.59 over 457m at Q Lakeside. Capable of a good showing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resumes from a ten weeks spell and was a winner at only other fresh up run, scoring in 25.59 over 457m at Q Lakeside. Capable of a good showing.

runners.formComment: Good performance to win by 3 lengths at this track over 450m (25.21) beating Miss Blue Blaze in Grade 5 on April 7. Can continue the winning form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by 3 lengths at this track over 450m (25.21) beating Miss Blue Blaze in Grade 5 on April 7. Can continue the winning form.

runners.formComment: In the money last time at this track (25.42) in a Grade 5, finishing a 3 length second. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In the money last time at this track (25.42) in a Grade 5, finishing a 3 length second. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Looking to others.

runners.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when second (25.76) over 450m at this track. Looks to have the job ahead.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when second (25.76) over 450m at this track. Looks to have the job ahead.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On the turn off the back straight, brushed the running rail.

runners.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 3.5 lengths second at this track but did record a head turning 25.28 over the 450m journey. Can slot into the minors again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 3.5 lengths second at this track but did record a head turning 25.28 over the 450m journey. Can slot into the minors again.

runners.formComment: Was strongly fancied last time and hit the ground running with a fast early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish fourth (20.43) at this track over 350m. Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was strongly fancied last time and hit the ground running with a fast early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish fourth (20.43) at this track over 350m. Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels leaving the first turn and lost vital ground.
